title: Schema & Structured Output

classes.name: ObjectSchema
methods: protected static disableAdditionalProperties(array $schema): array — recursively sets additionalProperties=false on all object nodes and array item nodes

external_types.name: Type
external_types.role: Base JSON schema type; composed inside Schema as $schema property

external_types.name: ObjectType
external_types.role: Extends Type; instantiated in ObjectSchema constructor via new ObjectType($schema)->withoutAdditionalProperties()

relationships: ObjectSchema overrides toSchema() — adds recursive additionalProperties=false logic
key_notes: Schema is the base wrapper: holds a Type object, provides name/strict config, delegates serialisation to Type::toArray()
ObjectSchema specialises Schema for JSON object types: wraps raw array into ObjectType, then strips additional properties recursively (including nested objects and array items)
Schemable is the local contract boundary; PrismSchema and HasSchemaType are Prism library contracts for structured-output integration
withName() returns a new instance (immutable builder pattern)
disableAdditionalProperties() is a recursive static helper — handles 'object' type nodes and 'items' (array) nodes
